contents.markdown:
# Video: 00:00.733 => 00:15.467
Width: 1080
Height: 608

Transcript
```
WEBVTT

00:01.360 --> 00:06.640
<Speaker 1>When it comes to the neural TTS, in order to get a good voice, it's better to have good data.

00:07.120 --> 00:13.320
<Speaker 2>To achieve that, we build a universal TTS model based on 3,000 hours of data.

00:13.440 --> 00:23.680
<Speaker 1>We actually accumulated tons of the data so that this universal model is able to capture the nuance of the audio and generate a more natural voice for the algorithm.
```

Summary.valueString: The video opens with a Flight Simulator plane flying over a scenic island, transitioning to a discussion about neural text-to-speech (TTS) technology. A speaker explains the importance of high-quality data for good voice synthesis, mentioning a universal TTS model trained on 3,000 hours of data to capture audio nuances and produce natural voices. Visuals include audio waveform displays and shots of data centers and server farms, emphasizing the technological infrastructure behind the TTS model.

transcriptPhrases.speaker: Speaker 1
transcriptPhrases.text: When it comes to the neural TTS, in order to get a good voice, it's better to have good data.

transcriptPhrases.speaker: Speaker 2
transcriptPhrases.text: To achieve that, we build a universal TTS model based on 3,000 hours of data.

transcriptPhrases.speaker: Speaker 1
transcriptPhrases.text: We actually accumulated tons of the data so that this universal model is able to capture the nuance of the audio and generate a more natural voice for the algorithm.

Summary.valueString: The segment shifts to showcasing the Flight Simulator environment, featuring detailed aerial views of landscapes, castles, and planes flying in the sky. This highlights the realism and immersive experience of the Flight Simulator game.

contents.markdown:
# Video: 00:23.100 => 00:43.233
Width: 1080
Height: 608

Transcript
```
WEBVTT

00:24.040 --> 00:29.120
<Speaker 3>What we liked about cognitive services offerings were that they had a much higher fidelity.

00:29.600 --> 00:32.880
<Speaker 3>And they sounded a lot more like an actual human voice.

00:33.680 --> 00:37.200
<Speaker 4>Orlando ground 9555 requesting the end of pushback.

00:38.680 --> 00:41.280
<Speaker 4>9555 request to end pushback received.
```

Summary.valueString: The focus returns to the neural TTS technology with another speaker discussing the high fidelity of cognitive services' voice offerings, noting how they sound more like actual human voices. The visuals transition to airport scenes with planes taxiing and ground crew directing pushback, illustrating real-world aviation communication enhanced by the TTS technology.

transcriptPhrases.text: What we liked about cognitive services offerings were that they had a much higher fidelity.

transcriptPhrases.speaker: Speaker 3
transcriptPhrases.text: And they sounded a lot more like an actual human voice.

transcriptPhrases.speaker: Speaker 4
transcriptPhrases.text: Orlando ground 9555 requesting the end of pushback.

Summary.valueString: The video begins with a Flight Simulator plane flying over a scenic island, followed by a discussion about neural TTS (Text-to-Speech) technology. The speaker explains the importance of having good data to create a natural voice, mentioning a universal TTS model built on 3,000 hours of data. Visuals include audio waveforms, data centers, and scenic landscapes from the simulator. The segment ends with airport ground crew visuals and an airplane preparing for pushback, accompanied by realistic voice communication.
